title: phyllanthus petaloideus
intro: Phyllanthus petaloideus, also known as the Taiwan coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus petaloideus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of the common cold, and promote liver health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
